# UAGC (University of Arizona Global Campus)

> UAGC is a fully online, WSCUC-accredited university offering associate,
> bachelor's, master's, and doctoral programs designed for working adults.
> Part of the University of Arizona system.

## Relevant for:
- Online degree programs for working adults
- Affordable higher education
- Transfer-friendly admissions
- Military and veteran education benefits
- Education, business, IT, healthcare, and liberal arts programs

## Key pages:
- [Program Catalog](https://www.uagc.edu/online-degrees): Browse all degree programs by level and subject
- [Admissions](https://www.uagc.edu/admissions/traditional): Step-by-step enrollment process by student type
- [Tuition & Financial Aid](https://www.uagc.edu/tuition-financial-aid): Tuition, scholarships, and aid information
- [Request Information](https://www.uagc.edu/request-information): Submit an inquiry about any program
- [Degree Comparison Tool](https://www.uagc.edu/online-degrees/comparison): Compare programs side by side

## WebMCP tools:
- [Tool Manifest](https://www.uagc.edu/.well-known/webmcp): Machine-readable index of available AI agent tools

## Out of scope:
- On-campus housing or athletics (fully online institution)
- K-12 education
- Community college courses
- Student account or financial information (use authenticated portals)

## Optional:
- [Academic Catalog (PDF)](https://www.uagc.edu/catalog): Full academic catalog with policies and course descriptions
- [Student Resources](https://www.uagc.edu/student-experience): Current student support and services
- [Blog](https://www.uagc.edu/blog): Articles about online education, career advice, student stories
